'''bashongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headcast|headcast]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headcast|headcast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bashongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæshengeth|bæshengeth]] || [[word:bæshengej|bæshengej]] || [[word:bæshengesh|bæshengesh]] || [[word:bæshenge|bæshenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bashoshongoth|bashoshongoth]] || [[word:bashoshongoj|bashoshongoj]] || [[word:bashoshongosh|bashoshongosh]] || [[word:bashoshongo|bashoshongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bashongoth|bashongoth]] || [[word:bashongoj|bashongoj]] || [[word:bashongosh|bashongosh]] || [[word:bashongo|bashongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bashofngoth|bashofngoth]] || [[word:bashofngoj|bashofngoj]] || [[word:bashofngosh|bashofngosh]] || [[word:bashofngof|bashofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bashongotho|bashongotho]] || [[word:bashongojo|bashongojo]] || [[word:bashongosho|bashongosho]] || [[word:bashongoko|bashongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bashongoth|bashongoth]] || [[word:bashongoj|bashongoj]] || [[word:bashongosh|bashongosh]] || [[word:bashongo|bashongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bashongothol|bashongothol]] || [[word:bashongojol|bashongojol]] || [[word:bashongoshol|bashongoshol]] || [[word:bashongokol|bashongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bashongothotho|bashongothotho]] || [[word:bashongojojo|bashongojojo]] || [[word:bashongoshosho|bashongoshosho]] || [[word:bashongoko|bashongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bashongothon|bashongothon]] || [[word:bashongojon|bashongojon]] || [[word:bashongoshon|bashongoshon]] || [[word:bashongokon|bashongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bashongothoro|bashongothoro]] || [[word:bashongojoro|bashongojoro]] || [[word:bashongoshoro|bashongoshoro]] || [[word:bashongokoro|bashongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
